description: Agent-org session discipline for Grok on Herdr: org-lane-mark marks sessions that dispatch Herdr workers (PreToolUse on shell/run when command mentions herdr agent start or dispatch-worker); org-conduct-refresh re-injects role-skill re-read order after compaction (SessionStart compact matcher); org-stop-gate blocks a marked session's first Stop with anti-idle checklist. All inert if never dispatched workers. Commands use exact ${GROK_PLUGIN_ROOT} load-time substitution (nested ${VAR:-default} expands empty).
